title: neottia striata
intro: Neottia striata, also known as the striped lip orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Neottia in the family Orchidaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which provide various health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, that can help protect against oxidative stress and infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Neottia striata are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
